description_long: This armchair features a minimalist, modern design with a light wood frame and straight, angular lines. The seat and backrest are generously cushioned with thick, dark charcoal fabric upholstery, providing both comfort and visual contrast against the pale wood. The armrests are flat, wide, and made of the same light wood as the frame, extending seamlessly from the legs to the backrest. The back of the chair is characterized by vertical wooden slats, adding structural support and a touch of mid-century style. The legs are straight and squared, integrated into the frame for stability. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern armchair with a light wood frame, wide flat armrests, and thick dark charcoal cushions. The design is minimalist and visually striking, with vertical slats on the backrest.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat wooden armrests, thick seat and back cushions, and the clean, rectangular frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the angled backrest, deep seat cushion, and the continuous wooden frame supporting both the seat and back.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the vertical wooden slats of the backrest and the full width of the back cushion.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_armrest_design: flat, wide, rectangular wooden armrests integrated with the frame
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, straight, cushioned backrest with vertical wooden slats on the rear
attribute_leg_type: straight, squared wooden legs integrated into the frame
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid dark charcoal fabric with subtle woven texture
